key_strengths: Unassailable Azure + Office365 ecosystem with high switching costs
Exceptional FCF generation and pristine balance sheet
Copilot monetization beginning to layer on top of installed base
key_risks: OpenAI investment drag on near-term margins
Antitrust exposure in EU and potentially US cloud markets
Valuation leaves limited margin of safety at current price
buy_triggers: Price drops to implied FCF yield of 4%+ (approx $320 at current FCF)
Copilot ARPU data shows >15% conversion on Office365 commercial seats
sell_triggers: Azure growth decelerates below 20% for two consecutive quarters
Antitrust ruling forces structural separation of cloud and productivity
valuation_summary: At ~$400 per share, MSFT trades at ~32x NTM FCF — a premium warranted by moat quality but leaving modest margin of safety. Intrinsic value estimated at $350-450 depending on terminal growth assumptions.
source_summary: Analysis based on web search (Q4 2025 earnings), SEC filings via EDGAR, and training knowledge; no user context files provided.
